query:
-- Create customer records for the 8 unmatched Xero billing items
-- Analysis:
-- 1. Jack Green - $174.73 - UPS hardware supply (one-off, not recurring service)
-- 2. Ma Pa Me - $131.36 - mobile broadband (recurring)
-- 3. Nu-Dev Pty Ltd - $399.00 - TPG Fibre 400 (recurring)
-- 4. TYS MOLENDINAR PTY LTD - $200.91 - Site Bundle (recurring)
-- 5. Zam Coomera Square Pty Ltd - $142.30 - Zambrero site NBN bundle (recurring)
-- 6. Zam Marrickville Pty Ltd - $164.27 - Zambrero site NBN bundle (recurring)
-- 7. Zambrero Brabham (Surya Pty Ltd) - $136.36 - NBN bundle (recurring)
-- 8. Zambrero Karratha (The Trustee for SURYAVEER UNIT TRUST) - $136.36 - NBN bundle (recurring)

INSERT INTO customers (externalId, name, xeroContactName, billingPlatforms, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('C9034', 'Jack Green', 'Jack Green', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9035', 'Ma Pa Me', 'Ma Pa Me', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9036', 'Nu-Dev Pty Ltd', 'Nu-Dev Pty Ltd', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9037', 'TYS Molendinar Pty Ltd', 'TYS MOLENDINAR PTY LTD', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9038', 'Zambrero Coomera Square', 'Zam Coomera Square Pty Ltd', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9039', 'Zambrero Marrickville', 'Zam Marrickville Pty Ltd', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9040', 'Zambrero Brabham', 'Zambrero Brabham (Surya Pty Ltd)', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('C9041', 'Zambrero Karratha', 'Zambrero Karratha (The Trustee for SURYAVEER UNIT TRUST)', '["Xero"]', 'active', NOW(), NOW());

-- Now link the billing items to the new customers
UPDATE billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.contactName = c.xeroContactName
SET bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
  AND bi.contactName IN (
    'Jack Green', 'Ma Pa Me', 'Nu-Dev Pty Ltd', 'TYS MOLENDINAR PTY LTD',
    'Zam Coomera Square Pty Ltd', 'Zam Marrickville Pty Ltd',
    'Zambrero Brabham (Surya Pty Ltd)', 'Zambrero Karratha (The Trustee for SURYAVEER UNIT TRUST)'
  );

-- Verify
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId, bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN (
  'Jack Green', 'Ma Pa Me', 'Nu-Dev Pty Ltd', 'TYS MOLENDINAR PTY LTD',
  'Zam Coomera Square Pty Ltd', 'Zam Marrickville Pty Ltd',
  'Zambrero Brabham (Surya Pty Ltd)', 'Zambrero Karratha (The Trustee for SURYAVEER UNIT TRUST)'
);
